name: IZ*ONE CHU
overview: Reality show of the new girl group, IZ*ONE which was formed from the survival show, Produce 48. The title of the reality show is pronounced as "I want you," means what we want is the 12 girls (I want you 12 girls).

trailers.title: IZ*ONE CHU [1회] 2018 아이즈원 걸크러시능력시험 (feat. 치타쌤) 181025 EP.1
